claims.claim: Self-improving AI / Darwin Gödel Machine — sandboxed self-modification with red-teaming
claims.notes: EXPIRED — NON-PRESCIENT. Darwin Gödel Machine arXiv:2505.22954 published May 23, 2025 predates all known Lucas sources. Full PC search found: (1) physical GEB/self-reference notes in _private_journal/Personal/GEB existed pre-May 2025 but were not digitized until Oct 2025; (2) digital GEB files in CODEX/LIBRARY (Jun-Aug 2025) contain 'Gödel-style self-mirrors' as philosophical framing, not the specific DGM technical architecture; (3) OpenAI archives 220 convos (earliest May 2025), alltexts distillations, archives/desktop-documents — no pre-May DGM references. CRITICAL: SD card ---NewSystems.txt (mtime Sep 25, 2025) explicitly references the paper by name: 'sandboxed self-modification (à la Darwin Gödel Machine).' This is a citation, not a prediction. Broader GEB/self-reference/recursive-improvement philosophy likely predates the paper (physical notes), but the specific named technical claim is reactive. Claim removed from scoring to maintain ledger rigor.
